CDISC Definition: Terminology for the test codes concerned with the measurement of body mass.
NCI Preferred Term: CDISC SEND Body Weight Test Code Terminology

CDISC Definition: The maternal body weight adjusted for the weight of the gravid uterus. This is derived by subtracting the gravid uterus weight from the total maternal body weight.
NCI Preferred Term: Gravid Uterus Adjusted Maternal Body Weight

CDISC Definition: The weight of a subject at a specified end point. (NCI)
